Regarding July and September 2011 feed releases into containment in the aggregate amount of 1,700 kg, substantially all such product was recovered and sent off-site for disposal, and has been reflected in off-site transfers. comments.comment: Comments for Hydrocarbon release to Land: Non-routine releases have been reported in accordance with Section 8 of the 2011 CPPI Codes of Practice (rev.13) – Refineries and Terminals (www.cppi.ca, 2011).  All non-routine releases below the Section 8.3.1(3) thresholds have not been reported. Regarding a June 2011 3,300 kg hydrocarbon release into containment, substantially all such product was recovered and sent off-site for disposal, and has been reflected in off-site transfers. Therefore, the net volume reported is zero and, as per Section 8.3.3(2), zero releases have been reported to air.
